cms_provider_service.name: CMS Medicare Physician & Other Practitioners by Provider and Service
cms_provider_service.usage: Aggregate benchmark values only; provider identities are not committed.

oig_leie.name: HHS OIG LEIE Downloadable Database
oig_leie.usage: Exclusion categories and source semantics only; committed names are synthetic.

nppes_npi.name: CMS NPPES NPI Downloadable Files
nppes_npi.usage: Taxonomy and registry semantics only; committed NPIs and names are synthetic.

doj_health_care_fraud.name: DOJ Health Care Fraud public releases
doj_health_care_fraud.usage: Narrative pattern inspiration only; committed case narratives are synthetic.

notes: CMS benchmark rows keep aggregate public values and source metadata.
LEIE, NPPES, and demo identities are synthetic to avoid naming real providers in the MVP demo.
This is a deterministic testing fixture bundle, not an ML training corpus.
